feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Contact Person Partner Function in sales order processing
entry.content:
Hello There,

Quick question I know we can assign multiple contact person on a sales order processing level.

There is a business requirement that for one customer multiple contact persons are allocated and each contact person can individually place an order from their home-grown ordering system, how this could be possible with SAP?

What's the role of this partner function CP(Contact Person), is it possible for contact person to create a sales order?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Special Delivery for item category
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have a business requirement regarding delivery. I want to know if we can set up special delivery rules for item categories. For example:

ZTAN = Can only be delivered individually

ZTAN+TAN = System will throw an error

entry.title: SIC Code in Plant level
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community
I need to find the table/field of SIC code in a plant level. 
Similar to SIC Code for Item level which can be found in MVKE-MVGR1

Thank you

entry.title: How to maintain large number of entries in OVK2/OBAE transaction
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I've one requirement to maintain a large number(more than 4000 entries) of Country/Region entries in OVK2 and OBAE transaction. It is getting saved in a TR.

If anyone had similar requirement or having knowledge how this can be done, please let me know the possible methods to do the same.

Thanks,

Regards,

Akhil

SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Error while Creating Returns ZRE: Incompletion Log
entry.content:
Table VBUV for incompletion log at item levelHeader level error(Warning) related to TaxHello SAP Gurus,

I have a problem when creating a Consignment return delivery...the incomplete log which shows the following message:

Following data still needs to be completed

Item Missing data

10 Subtotal 6

10 CFOP

10 ICMS law

10 IPI law

10 Tax code

What should be done to solve this. 

Plz help.

entry.title: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi,

After an Upgrade with HANA 2022 some ATP Customizing Functions disappeared and i do not know where to find them. In older HANA Version you had the possibility to tick following options in this customizing step:

Sales- Basic Functions- Availability Check- Availability Check with ATP- Define Availability Check Group 

1. Total Sales

2. Total Deliver Reqs

3. Block with TrO Qties

4. no Pac.

5. Accumul.

6. RelChkPlan

Last 3 options can be found in the new (2022) customizing step Define Basic Availability Check Group Behavior but i cannot find customizing step for the first 3 options, they disappeared.

In the table TMVF are maintained- SM30 did not help.

entry.title: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the DETERMINE THE COST in the item category VOV7
entry.content: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the DETERMINE THE COST in the item category VOV7, By doing this does it just hide the cost on the pricing condition screen on the order from the user or does it remove the cost determination and any functionality that has in the order?

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Material memo text is no longer working in S4 HANA version
entry.content:
Hello,

We had configurated some Material memo texts which were pop up un VA01 when we created a new Sales Doc. with these materials. The points is we have migrated our systems to S4 Hana and since these functionality is not working, we have a mirror system as a copy of our previous system and there is still working. I have debugged it and the problem comes with this standard FM which no longer finds the text despite it exists in STXH table: 
this is where the problem comes from: I also saw that this FM have changed a lot in this newer version. 

and more concretely this select 

The only parameter which I could be suspecting is the language one:

the others are perfect.

But I'm unable to see why it is not finding the text related since I can see in the table the text we are looking for.

Any idea?

entry.title: VBRK-XBLNR field length
entry.content:
Hello All,

While creating the billing document through vf01, the XBLNR is generated as 14 digits instead of 12. How can I change the field length to 12 digits?

regards,

Vignesh

entry.title: Under-delivery return order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a return delivery for 6 hus. In practice, we see that only 5 pallets have been returned by our customer. We started processing the return delivery for the 5 hus which are returned. Therefore we do have a picking and packing status of B. The delivery quantity is grayed out and therefore the delivery quantity cannot be adjusted anymore.

I thought that this can be solved by unassigning the hus in the packing stage and then adjusting the quantity. However unassigning the hus is not possible as those are already picked. Do you have any tips/ suggestions on how to process an under-delivery for a return delivery while the delivery is already partially processed? Any help is much appreciated!

entry.title: Crédit management (OVA8)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would be really grateful if you can help me solve this need:

For the credit ceiling we have allocated a tolerance of 3% (OVA8), when the customer exceeds the ceiling, we release the order via VKM4 in order to authorize the release of the material, sometimes and taking into account the nature of our business, when preparing the order we exceed the ceiling, we want to implement the following management rule: do not block the release of goods if:
- the delivery amount is greater than or equal to the order amount * 3% + $10 (we want to add an amount in addition to the tolerance)
- if the delivery amount is less than the delivery amount (because the system cancels the VKM4 release authorization when the quantity field is modified more or less > critical field)

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD
entry.content:
Hey All,

When I try to create a sales order the PPR0 price condition is given, delivery document is generated for the same but when I try to create an invoice with that it's being generated with negative value, once I give the update on the pricing tab then that negative value is going away, can anyone out there help me out why it's giving negative value at the creation of invoice from VF01?

What could be possible options I can check here?

I checked the pricing determination, condition records but seems all good for me.

Please provide some guidance SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Sales Order Notification SD Billing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks,

entry.title: customer account for collect
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an urgent issue where a customer account number for collect is being copied when I enter sold-to-party in sales order with pop-up. But i am dont know from where this number is coming from. i have checked with vcust and in customer master but i couldn't find it. This number is used against billing with customer.

this number is copied to text field in header but customer is deleting the field and saving sales order so company can provide free firght, but still this field is copied to delivery. when i tried to make changes in text determination, the pop-up itself not comming. Please help me on this.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Hi Everyone, Can you please share me the all list of BADI Available for SAP SD.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

  I need all badi name for SAP SD, 

Like BP, Material Master , Sales Order, Delivery and Billing,

I have tried from SE24 Exithandler, but all badi is not coming, 
Please help me

entry.title: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES
entry.content: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES Objective : On certain contracts, our supplies are linked to contractual quantities which extend over several years. The system should help us generate purchase requisitions and not delivery times when all target quantities are achieved as per delivery schedules. But that is not the case today. Here is an example in test base Item: 143000340 Supplier: x Open order: 440133 Extension: 2710 Test #1 DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES modified at the end of 2024 Target quantity adjusted to the end of 2024 with delivered history + upcoming delivery until the end of 2024  Target quantity in open order: 1792 CT We launch the Net Need Calculation via MD41 and it works: the system generates a Purchase Request after 2024. But it is the DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES that does the work and not the targeted quantities. See below. Test #2 The SOURCE DIRECTORY provisioning was changed immediately to see how the system reacts. We do not change the target quantity. Here, the system generates delivery times in 2025 and does not take into account the target quantity. Test #3 We go back to where we started and do the opposite. We are setting the end of validity of the SOURCE DIRECTORY offer at 2024 and we are not setting any quantitative objective. The net requirement calculation works and the system generates the purchase request. Conclusion: it is the SOURCE DIRECTORY of supply which controls and we would like to be able to control by the target quantity as well, please inform me of the customization to be made

entry.title: Wrong Translation Date in billing document
entry.content:
Hello dear Experts,

When creating billing for a return delivery there is a problem with the Translation Date,
I will describe the situation below:

The customer creates the corresponding order and completes the data, where, among other things, he enters the pricing date of 20.02.2024 in the document header, on the document items is the same date, then there is a delivery document and we proceed to issue invoices. When creating the billing pricing date on the billing items agrees, but the rate is incorrect, after creating billing when we go to the accounting document and then to the header data, we see that the Translation Date is 18.03.2024 (the same as the billing date), but it should be 20.02.2024. In the VBRK table in the KURRF_DAT field, the date 18.03.2024 is visible.

Could I ask you experts for a hint how to solve this problem?

 

Thanks in advance experts.

entry.title: how to maintain customer material info record with Ship to party/Custom partn + material combination
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Do we have any standard setting to maintain  'Customer master info record '  with Shipto party or Custom Partner with Material combination? in SAP S/4.

Thanks

SAP new learner

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also, learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.
